accountId.title: accountId
accountId.description: The Account Id of the doctor (Person Account). This must come from the recordId of the doctor resolved in topic Instruction 2 — never invent or guess this Id.

doctorId.title: doctorId
doctorId.description: The Account Id of the doctor (Person Account). This must come from the recordId of the doctor resolved in topic Instruction 2 — never invent or guess this Id.

endDate.title: endDate
endDate.description: The visit end date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Default to today if the user did not specify a date. If the user provided only one date, use that same date for both startDate and endDate.

startDate.title: startDate
startDate.description: The visit start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Default to today if the user did not specify a date. If the user provided only one date, use the same value for startDate and endDate.

visitNotes.title: visitNotes
visitNotes.description: A clean, professional, third-person summary of what was discussed in the visit, generated from the user's input. Do not include first-person language.

visitType.title: visitType
visitType.description: One of: Meeting, Revisit, In-Clinic, Routine Calls, Feedback Calls, Product Sampling, Relationship Building, Demonstration. Pick the closest match to the user's intent.
